evals.prompt: Create a settings form module called `search_settings` for configuring search parameters on a Drupal 10 site. The form at `/admin/config/search/search-settings` should have fields for: similarity_threshold (number, default 0.7), result_limit (number, default 5), and cache_ttl (number, default 300). Save all settings to config. Include a config schema file. We want D11 compatibility.
evals.expected_output: ConfigFormBase with getEditableConfigNames, config schema, route with _form key
expectations: Form class extends ConfigFormBase (not FormBase) -- ConfigFormBase provides getEditableConfigNames(), config helpers, and automatic submit button/status message via parent calls

buildForm() calls parent::buildForm($form, $form_state) and returns its result -- parent adds the submit button automatically (NOT manually adding a '#type' => 'submit' element which duplicates the button)

submitForm() calls parent::submitForm($form, $form_state) for the automatic 'The configuration options have been saved.' status message (NOT calling messenger()->addMessage() manually for save confirmation)

submitForm() uses $this->config('search_settings.settings') to get editable config (NOT \Drupal::configFactory()->getEditable() static call -- ConfigFormBase provides $this->config() which returns editable config within submitForm)
Config schema file exists and uses appropriate types: 'integer' for result_limit and cache_ttl, 'float' for similarity_threshold (NOT 'string' for all numeric fields)
Route uses _form key pointing to the form class (NOT _controller -- using _controller for a form bypasses CSRF protection, form token validation, and the full form lifecycle)
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en search_settings returns exit code 0
browser_checks: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to /admin/config/search/search-settings — verify the form renders with fields for similarity_threshold (showing 0.7), result_limit (showing 5), and cache_ttl (showing 300) with correct default values
